mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.created_by, c.content, c.like_count, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at, u.nickname as author_nickname, u.profile_image_url as author_profile_image FROM woorido.comments c LEFT JOIN woorido.users u ON c.created_by = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT id, post_id, parent_id, created_by, content, like_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM woorido.comments WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, post_id, parent_id, created_by, content, like_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM woorido.comments WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.comments SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{commentId} AND like_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM woorido.comments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
